testcase.name: test_stripe_connect_onboard_creates_and_is_idempotent
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter48_cash_bounties.py:203: in test_stripe_connect_onboard_creates_and_is_idempotent assert r1.status_code == 200, r1.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Stripe Connect setup failed: You can only create new accounts if you've signed up for Connect, which you can do at https://dashboard.stripe.com/connect."} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_stripe_connect_account_after_onboard

failure.message: AssertionError: expected non-null account after onboard assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter48_cash_bounties.py:225: in test_stripe_connect_account_after_onboard assert acct is not None, "expected non-null account after onboard" E AssertionError: expected non-null account after onboard E assert None is not None
